reviews.review_description: I’ve always wanted a liminal game and this game PERFECTS it the graphics are amazing they perfected the feel of being watched but it’s perfect and it’s amazing

reviews.review_title: Why do people who haven’t play get votes
reviews.review_description:
Most are putting “Why”
“I don’t like it”

Also, how do you enter the liminal spaces, thank you in advance dev.
Good game, Good graphics. Thats all you need to know if you get this game.

reviews.review_title: I have longed for this type of game
reviews.review_description:
Overall, the game was really enjoyable and easy to play, hope to see more levels and popularity in the future.

Please bring back the railroad and level 94 the graphics were so peak



Also is it true that if you stay in the poolrooms for a while a monster spawns in??
Me and axo a mod played this game and I streamed it it was rilly fun this game should update more but so far its fun
i really love liminal phobia because the community is very nice and i can make videos and it just feels so much more fun to play than any of these other liminal/background games
As the head admin i approve

reviews.review_title: Liminal Phobia is the best game
reviews.review_description: Liminal phobia vr is the best backrooms game with gorilla tag physics and great audio and amazing community
This game was really great i enjoyed playing it and the graphics were very good

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review to LiminalPhobia VR!! We are glad you enjoyed the game, expect more updates in the near future and join the discord for more!!
